overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of a student character exploring the interior of a gothic castle, moving through wood-paneled rooms, a grand common room with a large fireplace, corridors with magical artifacts, and a tapestry-lined hallway. The environment features warm firelight, stone architecture, and detailed medieval furnishings.

segments.scene_description: The character begins in a wood-paneled study room with ornate cabinets and a balcony overlook. Warm lamplight illuminates scattered papers on a central table as the character walks toward a stone archway leading to another room.

segments.scene_description: The character enters a grand common room dominated by a massive stone fireplace with a roaring fire. The warm glow illuminates red armchairs and towering bookshelves as the character approaches the hearth, passing under hanging lanterns.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow corridor with bookshelves and skeleton display

segments.scene_description: The character moves into a narrower corridor at the back of the room, passing a skeleton in robes and stacks of books. A framed dragon drawing hangs on the wall before the character ascends a stone staircase to the upper level.

long wooden benches arranged in rows on the upper level
arched wooden door set in stone frame

segments.scene_description: Emerging onto an upper balcony, the character walks along the great hall with tall gothic windows revealing the night outside. An ornate iron chandelier hangs above wooden benches as the character moves toward a stone archway.

scene_state.functional_zone: long corridor with large woven tapestries

segments.scene_description: The character enters a long corridor adorned with magnificent woven tapestries, including one depicting a unicorn. Velvet ropes protect the wall hangings as the character walks toward a distant figure and stone archways at the corridor's end.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a quiet, wood-paneled study into a grand common room and finally up a narrow, artifact-lined corridor. It begins amidst ornate cabinets and scattered papers under warm lamplight, moving steadily toward a stone archway. As the character passes through the arch, the space expands into a vast common room where the soft lamp light is replaced by the intense, flickering glow of a massive roaring fireplace and hanging lanterns. The scene then shifts from the open warmth of the hearth toward a narrower passage, passing a robed skeleton and a framed dragon drawing. Finally, the camera follows the character as they leave the common area behind to ascend a stone staircase toward the upper level.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the open heights of a gothic great hall into the intimate, enclosed space of a tapestry-lined corridor. It begins on an upper balcony, gliding past tall gothic windows that reveal the night sky and an ornate iron chandelier hanging over wooden benches. As the character moves forward, the open architecture of the hall narrows, leading the camera through a stone archway. The scene then shifts into a long, sheltered hallway where the stone walls are replaced by magnificent woven tapestries, including a depiction of a unicorn. The camera continues its steady progression past velvet ropes and toward a distant figure standing beneath the archways at the corridor's end.
